summary: Iteration 10 - Validated WebSocket Dashboard and Push Notifications implementation. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (VAPID key, push subscribe, notifications CRUD, push send, WebSocket endpoint). Frontend: Dashboard shows connection status badge ('Offline' expected in preview), notification bell icon with unread count, notification center popover working.
passed_tests: GET /api/push/vapid-key - Returns VAPID public key (no auth required)
POST /api/push/subscribe - Registers push subscription with auth
POST /api/push/send - Returns 0 sent when no devices (non-existent hotel)
POST /api/push/send with subscriptions - Sends to subscribed devices
Integration test: full notification flow (create → get → mark read)
Frontend: Dashboard page loads with stats
Frontend: WebSocket status badge shows 'Offline' (expected in preview)
Frontend: Notification bell icon present with data-testid='notification-bell'
Frontend: Notification center popover opens when bell clicked
Frontend: Refresh/Atualizar button present with data-testid='refresh-dashboard-btn'
critical_code_review_comments: Push notifications are MOCKED/SIMULATED - uses in-memory storage, not pywebpush
VAPID key is a placeholder from environment variable (not generated)
Notification history is stored in-memory (not persisted to database)
Push subscriptions stored in-memory (lost on server restart)
WebSocket shows 'Offline' in preview environment due to protocol restrictions (wss:// requires special handling)
seed_data_creation: Created test notifications via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket and Push Notification endpoints all working. Dashboard shows 'Offline' status for WebSocket which is expected in preview environment. Notification center shows test notifications created during pytest. All data-testid attributes properly set (ws-status, notification-bell, refresh-dashboard-btn).

mocked_apis.push_notifications: Push notifications use in-memory storage, not real pywebpush integration
mocked_apis.vapid_key: VAPID public key is a placeholder, not dynamically generated
mocked_apis.notification_history: Stored in-memory, not persisted to Supabase database
mocked_apis.push_subscriptions: Stored in-memory, not persisted to database

vapid_key.note: Key is placeholder from env var VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY

push_subscribe.status: Working - requires auth, stores subscription in memory

notifications_get.status: Working - returns notification list from in-memory store

notifications_create.status: Working - creates notification and broadcasts via WebSocket

push_send.status: Working - returns count of devices (MOCKED, doesn't use pywebpush)

websocket_dashboard.status: Endpoint exists - shows 'Offline' in preview (protocol restriction)

frontend_ws_badge.status: Working - shows 'Offline' badge with wifi icon

frontend_notification_bell.status: Working - bell icon with unread count badge, opens popover
